case_title: ROSARIO ORTIZ VS. LEOPOLDO A LINDGAN RUAZOL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORTIZ, ROSARIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RUAZOL, LEOPOLDO A LINDGAN DBA DESIGN TECH SF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ROSARIO ORTIZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LEOPOLDO LINDGAN RUAZOL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
